title: Advancements++
description: Adds over 50 new advancements to minecraft.
body:
## About
This datapack replaces those boring old advancements with ones never thought of before.
### Discord: [https://discord.gg/cwTNRAyban](https://discord.gg/cwTNRAyban)
## Features
Advancements++ adds over 50 new advancements.
- Farming: 6
- Nether: 7
- End: 4
- Mining: 11
- Minecraft: 17
- Adventure: 11

## Warning
By default, advancements++ will override **all vanilla minecraft advancements.**
